et0_daily_mean_mm.justification: FAO-56 Table 4: humid region 2-5 mm/day, Michigan temperate humid to warm continental

r2_vs_openmeteo.justification: Allen et al. (1998) Annex 4: PM R² > 0.90 vs stations; 0.85 allows ERA5 noise

rmse_mm_per_day.justification: Doorenbos & Pruitt (1977): ±1.5 mm/day acceptable; 2.0 allows ERA5 uncertainty

cv_pct.justification: Allen et al. (1998): 5-15% across 50 km; Michigan network ~350 km, up to 30% plausible

cross_station_r.justification: ASCE Standardization (2005): r > 0.70 for same-region pairs; 85% pass rate accounts for distant UP pairs

seasonal_spread_mm.justification: MSU Enviro-weather: Michigan LP ET₀ 550-750 mm/season, max spread 250 mm
